title: Community Food Bank
description: Provides free groceries and meals to families in need within the local community.

title: Neighborhood Job Center
description: Offers job training, resume workshops, and employment opportunities for residents.

title: Community Health Clinic
description: Affordable healthcare services including check-ups, vaccinations, and mental health support.

title: Youth Sports League
description: Organizes sports activities and leagues for children and teens in the community.

title: Local Library
description: Provides access to books, digital resources, and community learning programs.
